functions.test_requirement: Cover GET /project-requests/freelancer/requests/my for UC-57 View List Assigned Request with executed Jest evidence for controller forwarding, returned accessible-request lists, empty-list behavior, and asserted terminal log messages.

returns: returns freelancer request access list from service

preconditions: Authenticated freelancer "freelancer-1" has request access records in visible statuses
Accessible request results are ordered by createdAt DESC
logs: Get Freelancer Request Access List Successful: 2 request(s)

preconditions: Authenticated freelancer "freelancer-1" has no request access records in statuses "INVITED", "ACCEPTED", or "PENDING"
returns: returns empty freelancer request access list
logs: Get Freelancer Request Access List Successful: 0 request(s)
